temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) A woman with dark, wavy hair, wearing a yellow patterned hospital gown, lies in a hospital bed. She looks off-screen with a furious expression and speaks angrily. (Storyline: The scene opens on a woman in a hospital bed, already in a state of anger, setting a tense and confrontational mood.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Angry, contemptuous. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
(00:02-00:03) The woman in the hospital bed continues to speak with a furious expression, her mouth open as if shouting. (Storyline: The woman's anger escalates as she continues her tirade, though the object of her fury is not yet clear.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Furious, shouting. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
